reviews.review_description: I really like the humor and minigames. I just wish the loading time would be faster. Maybe have option to not start in the hub? I also think the loading screen should be as simple as possible for faster loading. Currently it's difficult to play the game if only have few spare minutes.

I love the puns, acting, music, sounds, visuals and almost everything else in this game, but two things ruins the experience for me: gameplay and loading times.

And these two problems are connected: since the game is a collection of minigames, there's not much point in waiting too much to play too little.

Also, you can't skip the first tutorial. Tip: if you are playing a minigame for the 1st time and want to replay it without rewathcing the tutorial, first to back to the hub and enter the minigame again. Afterwards you can restart without going back to the hub.

In the end, I didn't enjoy the minigames enough to play them again - I even tried a few, but I found them too easy or not fun enough.
Really enjoyed this game. Simple but fun.
I had this game since I had the go it’s got a lot of mini games and cool sound effects I hope there is more to come soon from oliver and the controls are really good
I love this game, if you like the minigames and robot humors, you should buy

I did a review of this game on my channel YouTube.com/UrGamingTechie In short this has a great varied mini game wrapped up in a short story with great gameplay and graphics. Leaderboards for all the mini games, new updates coming with more games. Check it out
Good game with good comedy and it’s a big game for the go!

reviews.review_title: How long is the game session?
reviews.review_description: A question (after I bought) - how long is a typical session? Many hours or minutes?
Cool game, decent fun graphics, lots to do, challenging and just a real winner all around.  You won’t get bored and will get quite a few chuckles along the way.
Would recommend to someone new to vr!

I only started using VR today and found so many experiences daunting or hard to navigate. Not this one though! Colourful, fun and a joyous exploration of what’s possible. My only criticism would be that i can’t start from scratch with a new robot. I can play as a second one but I’d love to know how the story could have panned out had I made different choices.

Still an outstanding title with a stellar cast!
A funny game. I had quite a blast playing "They Suspect Nothing". It had quite a funny story to it. A game that I didn't want to end. But, let's hope they add more to it.

developer_response.body: Hey Logan, awesome to hear you enjoyed They Suspect Nothing. We are happy to let you know that we will be bringing 8 all new mini-games in the form of free DLC! Thanks for taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_description: I liked how it had mini games
Great 12 mini games fun to play in short bursts. Nice humour.
Some good mini games...  some others feel like... work.  Overall, good.

reviews.review_title: should have read the 2 latest reviews
reviews.review_description:
PLAYING ON A QUEST, was going to rate a 4.5, but got to the bookmarking stage, i skimmed that there were issues but didn't realize it TOTALLY PREVENTS YOU FROM proceeding. It's a real shame that the devs have known this error for months and supposedly has said they are working on it. also a shame how this game got through the Oculus approval process for GO emulation in the first place.

   as far as the game goes, out of the 11 minigames i played so far, i probably enjoyed around half and found the other half quite similar to each other. My fav so far was the drone flying one and the detective wardrobe one.
The mini games are really fun, and the app is overall well produced

developer_response.body: Hey AaronThompson78, thank you so much for your review. We're glad to hear that you had a great time playing They Suspect Nothing.

reviews.review_description: A series of mini games linked together with a vague storyline. We'll made with decent graphics. But too much talking for me.
Haven't finished it through but the half I've played I really enjoy. Lots to do and fun mini games that draw you in. Good job!
The minigames are suuuper fun and cool! I like how some of hem relate to life. Definetly worth the price
